title: DS Patterns — Timeline, Stepper Wizard, File Upload, Notification Inbox, Filter Bar
summary: Reference JSX implementation of composite UI pattern components (Timeline, Stepper/Wizard, FileUploadZone, and related patterns) demonstrating layout structure, interaction states, and design token usage for the design system handoff.
notes: Manifest declared SPEC; content is JSX reference implementation of pattern components, consistent with technical specification of UI contracts.
